violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the rack above the hot-hold line has an accumulation of dust. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent contamination of foods and equipment/utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored hanging on the racks in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (Fan covers in the walk in cooler) have an accumulation of dust. All non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The condensation in the low boy freezer was observed to be accumulating at the bottom of the unit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

At the time of inspection, Chicken Soup and Tartar Sauce was observed kept beyond the 7 day use-by date on marked on the date marking sticker. Food items were disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
